summary: Community Forum feature testing complete. All 15 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tested - forum list page, new post dialog, post page with comments, close post dialog, best answer marking, and solved status all working. 'Scan All Members' button verified in Admin Settings > Diagnostics tab.
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forum feature fully functional. Existing posts: TEST_ForumPost (open), 'How to calculate lot size?' (closed with best answer). Top contributor: superadmin@test.com with 1 best answer. Rewards points: 50 for Best Answer, 15 for Active Collaborator.

forum_list_page.details: Loads at /forum with stats (Total Posts, Open, Solved, Comments), Top Contributors section, search input, filter buttons (All, Open, Solved)

new_post_dialog.details: Opens with Title, Content, Tags fields and Post button. Creates post and redirects to post page

post_page.details: Shows post details, author with Admin badge, tags, comments section, comment input, Reply button, Close button, Delete button

add_comment.details: Comments can be posted on open posts. Comment appears immediately after submission

close_post_dialog.details: Shows Best Answer selection (+50 pts), Active Collaborators (+15 pts each), Points Summary, and 'Close & Award Points' button

closed_post.details: Shows 'Solved' badge and message 'This post has been closed. No new comments can be added.'

sidebar_nav.details: Community Forum link visible in sidebar with data-testid='nav-forum'

scan_all_members.details: Button found in Admin Settings > Diagnostics tab with data-testid='scan-all-members-btn' under 'Retroactive Rewards Scan' section

GET_forum_posts.details: Returns posts array with pagination and filters (status, tag, search)

POST_forum_posts.details: Creates new post with title, content, tags

GET_forum_posts_id.details: Returns post with comments array and increments view count

POST_forum_posts_id_comments.details: Adds comment to open post, returns 400 for closed posts

PUT_forum_posts_id_close.details: Closes post and awards points (50 for best answer, 15 for collaborators)

GET_forum_stats.details: Returns total_posts, open_posts, closed_posts, total_comments, top_contributors

DELETE_forum_posts_id.details: Deletes post and all its comments

api_tests_run: POST /api/forum/posts/{id}/comments - Add comment to open post
ui_elements_verified: data-testid='scan-all-members-btn' - Retroactive scan button in Diagnostics
